programmes.show_description: Can weightlifter Lucy strike dating gold with Caroline? Will Star Wars fan Rachel provide self-confessed nerd Lachlan with a new hope?
A Serious Flanders (Part 1/2): In a Fargo-style two-parter, Flanders donates a big bag of money he's found to an orphanage. But some very nefarious characters want it back...
A Serious Flanders (Part 2/2): Flanders is pursued by ruthless gangsters who want their money back. And Homer manages to get himself caught in the crossfire.
Brand new series: The first Commitment Ceremony brings some brutal honesty. And the simmering tensions between the brides erupt into a fiery showdown.
Brand new series: Does Jazz have feelings for Inga? Jules and Tristan are furious with Chuggs. Freddy's back in Beks' bad books. Alice and Sam Vanderpump throw their baby shower.
Food in a Geoffy: Murray and Geoff have to run around Jenkintown looking for an important cheese steak after a food delivery job goes sideways.
Animal House: While Barry's love of Animal House fails to impress an elite fraternity, Beverly tries to convince Murray to take up new hobbies.
In 2015, Tommy decided to marry bride Hannah on water skis. Only problem was, he couldn't water ski! Now they reflect on their big day: did it sink or swim?
A revelation leaves Warren seething, and tensions flare at The Loft. Meanwhile, when a text lands in the wrong hands, a resident is forced into a tough parenting dilemma.
Mercedes is determined to find out what Jenson's up to. Wanting to bring happiness during a difficult time, Ste makes a big decision. And a sister is backed into a corner.
A short, cheeky clip featuring animals and food, from the always hilarious Tube that is Rude.
Luigi's: Gordon Ramsay travels to Orange County, Southern California, to try to save Italian restaurant Luigi's from disaster.
Parents Thursday: Erica tries to fool Beverly into thinking that the school have rescheduled parents weekend. Adam joins the school production of Romeo & Juliet.
A 100% True Ghost Story: After discovering The Rocky Horror Picture Show, Barry decides to throw a Halloween party for the ages - no matter what Erica says.
En Garde: The family supports Manny's new interest - fencing. It turns out he's pretty good at it, but Jay's proud enthusiasm triggers an old childhood wound for Mitchell.
Great Expectations: With a history of giving bad gifts, Claire is determined to surprise Phil with an amazing anniversary present - a private performance by Izzy LaFontaine.
Brand new series: The first Commitment Ceremony brings some brutal honesty. And the simmering tensions between the brides erupt into a fiery showdown.
Craig isn't seeking a husband, just a man he can believe in and own a dog with. Could Luke and his 'boyfriend bum' be the one? And Disney fan Holly seeks her happily ever after.
Park's Edge: In Atlanta, Gordon helps first-time restaurant owners Richard and Jorge, whose establishment is in trouble due to their constant fighting, poor food and bad vibes.
Springfield Up: Famous filmmaker Declan Desmond (voiced by Eric Idle) comes to Springfield to chronicle the lives of its residents for his series Growing Up Springfield.
Special Edna (a.k.a. Love and Marking): When Skinner stands up Mrs Krabappel to attend to his mother's whims, Bart nominates her for Teacher of the Year.
Starry Night: Jay and Mitchell set out on their traditional father-son outing to see the meteor showers, but Mitchell is surprised to see that Manny will be joining them.
Brand new series: The first Commitment Ceremony brings some brutal honesty. And the simmering tensions between the brides erupt into a fiery showdown.
In Vilamoura in Portugal, Brendan's celebs reach new heights while parasailing and let off steam at a ju-jitsu lesson. But a split grows between OGs and newbies.
Moonshine River: Marge and Lisa try to experience all of New York City's culture when the family travel to the Big Apple looking for Bart's long-lost love Mary Spuckler.
Treehouse of Horror XXIII: A black hole terrorises Springfield, Homer installs cameras in the house when things go bump in the night, and Bart travels back in time.
Warren decides who he wants, but is he too late? Meanwhile, friends gather around to support Diane and Tony.
...Australia - Brand new series: The brides are torn over Stella and Brook's fallout. And the start of Intimacy Week spells disaster for a bride whose groom refuses to kiss her.
Brand new series: Made in Chelsea OGs Binky, Lucy and Rosie navigate more new challenges and major milestones. It's Binky's birthday but Lucy and Rosie's friendship turns frosty.
Our First Dates daters get matched with celebrity singletons, from Jamie Laing to Jorgie Porter, Anthea Turner and Alexandra Burke, in this special episode for Stand Up To Cancer.
After dating a few love rats, beautician Gemma wants to find her Prince Charming. Tattoo artist Jennafer is fed up with men and is looking for the perfect woman.
On the TV this time: Planet Earth III, Mamma Mia! I Have a Dream, Surviving Paradise, Uncanny, Celebrity Race Across the World, Crack Addicts and BBC News (Sir Bobby Charlton).
Brand new series: The brides are torn over Stella and Brook's fallout. And the start of Intimacy Week spells disaster for a bride whose groom refuses to kiss her.
Brand new series: Made in Chelsea OGs Binky, Lucy and Rosie navigate more new challenges and major milestones. It's Binky's birthday but Lucy and Rosie's friendship turns frosty.
Treehouse of Horror XXIII: A black hole terrorises Springfield, Homer installs cameras in the house when things go bump in the night, and Bart travels back in time.
Adventures in Baby-Getting: Marge gets a new car that's perfect for a family of five - but what if she decides she wants a family of six!?
Parents Thursday: Erica tries to fool Beverly into thinking that the school have rescheduled parents weekend. Adam joins the school production of Romeo & Juliet.
Adam let fate dictate his wedding to Bianca. What did she think of his plan to leave the details of their big day down to the contents of random envelopes?
Mercedes is determined to find out what Jenson's up to. Wanting to bring happiness during a difficult time, Ste makes a big decision. And a sister is backed into a corner.
Warren decides who he wants, but is he too late? Meanwhile, friends gather around to support Diane and Tony.
A short, cheeky clip from Rude Tube's naughty little sister Rude(ish) Tube, featuring sheep.
Park's Edge: In Atlanta, Gordon helps first-time restaurant owners Richard and Jorge, whose establishment is in trouble due to their constant fighting, poor food and bad vibes.
WrestleMania: Murray buys WrestleMania tickets to spend time with Barry and Adam, only to find that the tickets are fakes and they can't get in. Guest starring Hulk Hogan.
Angst-Giving: Pop-Pop and Uncle Marvin each find a way to disrupt Beverly's best-laid Thanksgiving plans.
Fizbo: Phil and Claire throw Luke the biggest birthday party a boy could want. But when Cameron appears as a clown named Fizbo, it sets off a chain of events that ends in hospital.
Undeck the Halls: Christmas is in full swing at the Dunphy house, until the kids get into trouble and Phil and Claire threaten to cancel Christmas unless one of them fesses up.
Brand new series: The brides are torn over Stella and Brook's fallout. And the start of Intimacy Week spells disaster for a bride whose groom refuses to kiss her.
Comedy queen Carol meets 76-year-old interior designer Keith. Charles is 26 and has never been kissed. Two south London sisters are both single and keen to do something about it.
The Greek at the Harbor: Gordon Ramsay helps a family-run Greek restaurant turn its fortunes around in Ventura Harbor in California. But he uncovers a shocking family secret...
Rome-Old & Juli-eh: Homer stops paying for Grampa's retirement home, so he has to stay with the family instead. In a twist no one saw coming, Grampa ends up marrying Selma.
Homerazzi: Homer becomes a paparazzo to get money to pay for fire damage to the house. But Springfield's celebrities are alarmed by his aggressive style and fight back.
Benched: When Luke and Manny's hot-tempered basketball coach quits in the middle of a game, Jay and Phil both jockey to fill the position.
Travels with Scout: When Phil's dad turns up in a mobile home with a little four-legged friend, Claire thinks he might be hiding an ulterior motive for his visit.
Brand new series: The brides are torn over Stella and Brook's fallout. And the start of Intimacy Week spells disaster for a bride whose groom refuses to kiss her.
Two more famous faces join the party in Portimão for some high-octane go-karting. As one pair jostle for position, will their opponents slam the brakes on their trip?
Adventures in Baby-Getting: Marge gets a new car that's perfect for a family of five - but what if she decides she wants a family of six!?
Gone Abie Gone: Grampa goes missing. Can Homer and Marge find him by following clues from when he used to work in a restaurant?
Rex braves his first public outing while experimenting with his image at an LGBTQ+ club night. And a shocking turn of events at The Loft relaunch party puts all eyes on Mercedes...
...Australia - Brand new series: Intimacy Week reaches boiling point as one relationship threatens to implode, and a bride makes a decision that breaks her groom's heart.
Brand new series: Tensions rise between Lucy and Rosie at Lucy's vegan cookbook launch. Binky's kids star in the launch of her clothing line. And Ollie tries some matchmaking.
Bob Mortimer, Richard Ayoade, Jennifer Saunders, Stephen Graham and Hannah Walters join the Goggleboxers for Survivor, Planet Earth III, Teen First Dates and loads more top TV.
